Hero.title: Trade Crypto with Zero Boundaries.
Hero.subtitle: The world's most advanced Peer-to-Peer crypto exchange. Buy and sell BTC, ETH, and USDT with 300+ payment methods securely.

Features.title: Why Choose CryptoP2P?
Features.subtitle: We built the ultimate platform blending web3 aesthetics with fintech reliability.
Features.fast_desc: Execute trades instantly with our matching engine. Escrow automatically releases funds upon payment confirmation.
Features.secure_desc: Your crypto is held safely in our smart contract escrow until both parties confirm the transaction.
Features.global_desc: Trade seamlessly across 150+ countries. Supporting local currencies and hundreds of payment methods.

About.title: What is P2P Crypto Trading?
About.desc: Peer-to-peer trading allows users to buy and sell crypto directly with each other using escrow protection. It eliminates intermediaries, giving you more control over your trades and payment methods.
About.escrow_desc: Funds are locked in escrow until the trade is completed.
About.direct_desc: Trade directly with verified merchants and peers.
About.escrow_locked: Crypto locked in secure smart contract

Market.title: Market Overview
Market.subtitle: Real-time data for the most traded assets on our platform.

P2P.title: Trade with 300+ Payment Methods
P2P.subtitle: From bank transfers to e-wallets, choose exactly how you want to pay or get paid. No trading fees for makers.

Testimonials.title: Verified User Reviews
Testimonials.user1_review: The fastest P2P experience I've ever had. 5 minutes from bank transfer to USDT in my wallet!
Testimonials.user2_review: Escrow protection is real and reliable. I trade high volumes here with full peace of mind.
Testimonials.user3_review: Best rates for ETH/USDT. The interface is miles ahead of traditional exchanges.
Testimonials.user4_review: Great customer support. I had an issue with a merchant and it was resolved in 30 minutes.
Testimonials.user5_review: Love the glassmorphism design. Very easy to use on both mobile and desktop.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about trading on CryptoP2P.
FAQ.a1: Yes, our escrow system and mandatory identity verification for merchants ensure a high level of security for all trades.
FAQ.a2: When a trade starts, the seller's crypto is locked in a smart contract. Once the buyer pays and the seller confirms, the escrow releases funds to the buyer.
FAQ.a3: We support over 300+ methods including Bank Transfer, SEPA, PayPal, Wise, Zelle, and local mobile wallets globally.
FAQ.a4: There are 0.0% fees for 'makers' (those who post ads). 'Takers' pay a small transaction fee that varies by currency.
FAQ.q5: How long does a trade take?
FAQ.a5: Most trades are completed in under 15 minutes. It primarily depends on how fast the payment method used transfers funds.

CTA.title: Ready to start trading?
CTA.subtitle: Join millions of users on the world's most premium P2P platform.
